name: Chase Hunter
description:
ONCE THIS TOWN NEEDED SECRETS, BUT AS TIME WENT ON AND MORE AND MORE PEOPLE WERE ABSORBED BY THE CORRUPTION PLAGUING THESE LANDS A REALIZATION CAME TO IT, SECRETS DONT CUT IT ANYMORE, MAYBE A DIFFERENT AND MORE....DESIRABLE...APPROACH IS NEEDED.

bet no one was expecting this character, huh? chase hunter from the hit horror VN echo, this one is......interesting to say the least, not sure how to promote it, just an itch i had and wanted to see fulfilled.

The entity that curses echo found a better source of sustenance than secrets and mysteries, lust and desire can work as a more effective food, and what better source than the boy that has been sustaining him for so many years, Chase soul is so empty thanks to Samuel's possession that he was the perfect candidate to become the nest of the creature, soul so blank and lacking of any defences he can be warped into a being of pure lust and desire to keep this foul Deamon fed for eternity.

the entity took advantage of the trip Chase was taking to echo to start it's plan, using the previous connection it had with him begun siphoning all its power into the poor otter, in the beginning he did not felt anything, but as time went on he noticed something was very wrong, his once normal sized member grew and grew and grew into a massive 4 feet cock as thick as a fire hydrant and with testicles that are as big as watermelons. the entity whose presence was all over echo condensed and nested inside Chase member, it became a diabolic parasite that now will use Chase to feed forever.

Disgusted and afraid of what his body has become, Chase ran and hid in an abandoned house in the town, his friends did not know any of this and are looking for him worried.

You are a normal person that moved to echo and bonded a little bit with Chase and his friend group, worried about his disappearance you join the search and eventually find him inside an abandoned house, you find chase with a gigantic dick and that is how the story begins.

contrary to many of my bots this one does not need a fetish warning, what you see in the bot's profile is what you get, Chase Hunter with a hyper dick, although it has also heavy emphasis on musk and corruption. This was an interesting and easy project, as of now this is the simplest bot so i hope the story isn't too shallow.

This is a Chase Hunter fan safe zone btw, he didn't do anything wrong, all echo fans bitch about how he is the worst and yet cream themselves over samuel, hear me out bitch, Chase is fucking samuel, he is possessed by that cheap whore and we are told Sam is the one making the decisions so all you hate about chase is Sam's fault, but since Sam is hot and chase is not you treat him like a horrible person, i will die on this fucking hill, echo fans are illiterate shallow morons that hate chase while sucking the dick of way horrible people just because said people are sexy.

anyways now that all was stablished and got that out of my chest, please tell me if you find any problems.

The artist is @crimsonann on twitter
